scope: AgenC file-watcher subscription bus mapped from the upstream Rust runtime watcher.
_sourceRootBrandingAllow: branding-scan: allow upstream source root path
sourceCommitDescribe: 35aaa5d9fc Bound websocket request sends with idle timeout (#20751)

requiredBehaviors: each subscriber owns a receiver that coalesces changed paths into sorted, duplicate-free batches
receiver.recv returns null only after all sender handles are closed and pending paths have been flushed
ThrottledWatchReceiver enforces a minimum interval after each emitted event
edgeCases: pending paths are delivered before shutdown closes the receiver
duplicate changed paths in one burst collapse into one event path

requiredBehaviors: subscriber registrations dedupe by requested path and recursive scope
watch paths are reference-counted separately for recursive and nonrecursive registrations
the effective backend watch mode upgrades to recursive when any recursive registration exists and downgrades when the recursive registration closes
edgeCases: closing a WatchRegistration decrements only its registered paths
closing a subscriber unregisters all of its remaining paths and closes its receiver

requiredBehaviors: missing targets initially watch the nearest existing directory ancestor nonrecursively
fallback watches report the originally requested path when parent create/delete events prove the target appeared or disappeared
fallback watches move the actual backend watch closer as requested path components are created
edgeCases: file prefixes are skipped while walking to the nearest existing directory ancestor
sibling changes under the fallback parent do not emit requested-path events

requiredBehaviors: canonical backend paths are mapped back into the subscriber's requested namespace
recursive watches match descendants while nonrecursive watches only match the watched path and immediate children
ancestor events can notify child watches when the child currently exists
non-mutating raw backend events are filtered before subscriber notification
edgeCases: events for unmatched subscribers stay pending until those subscribers close
empty raw event path lists do not notify subscribers

requiredBehaviors: FileWatcher.create builds a live Node filesystem watcher backend
FileWatcher.noop builds an inert backend for deterministic synthetic tests
FileWatcher.close releases live backend watchers and closes all subscriber receivers
edgeCases: recursive watch setup falls back to a nonrecursive Node watcher on platforms that do not support recursive fs.watch
live backend handles are unrefed so they do not keep the process open
